'''savaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadmittance|coadmittance]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-v-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadmittance|coadmittance]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| savaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sævægæth|sævægæth]] || [[word:sævægæj|sævægæj]] || [[word:sævægæsh|sævægæsh]] || [[word:sævægæ|sævægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:savavagath|savavagath]] || [[word:savavagaj|savavagaj]] || [[word:savavagash|savavagash]] || [[word:savavaga|savavaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:savagath|savagath]] || [[word:savagaj|savagaj]] || [[word:savagash|savagash]] || [[word:savaga|savaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:savafgath|savafgath]] || [[word:savafgaj|savafgaj]] || [[word:savafgash|savafgash]] || [[word:savafgaf|savafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:savagatha|savagatha]] || [[word:savagaja|savagaja]] || [[word:savagasha|savagasha]] || [[word:savagaka|savagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:savagath|savagath]] || [[word:savagaj|savagaj]] || [[word:savagash|savagash]] || [[word:savaga|savaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:savagathal|savagathal]] || [[word:savagajal|savagajal]] || [[word:savagashal|savagashal]] || [[word:savagakal|savagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:savagathatha|savagathatha]] || [[word:savagajaja|savagajaja]] || [[word:savagashasha|savagashasha]] || [[word:savagaka|savagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:savagathan|savagathan]] || [[word:savagajan|savagajan]] || [[word:savagashan|savagashan]] || [[word:savagakan|savagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:savagathaoro|savagathaoro]] || [[word:savagajaoro|savagajaoro]] || [[word:savagashaoro|savagashaoro]] || [[word:savagakaoro|savagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
